title: Cannot download project files on Essential Plan
symptom: Users on the Essential plan may find that the option to download project files is not visible in their project settings.
not_this_if: The download option is visible in project settings
root_cause: The download option for project files is not directly available unless the user first generates a code export. This step is necessary to unlock the download functionality.
fix_steps: Open the project in the WeWeb editor
Select the option to generate code export
Check the project deployments for the available files
agent_instruction: Generate a code export from the editor to enable project file downloads.
